title: Pizza+
description: Add artisanal pizzas with tomatoes, cheese, dough and various toppings to cook your own recipes!
body:
# 🍕 Pizza+ 🍕
A Minecraft mod that adds everything you need to make and enjoy pizzas right in your world!

## With Pizza+, you can:
- 🌱 Grow tomato plants to harvest fresh tomatoes.
- 🍅 Make tomato sauce from your harvest.
- 🔥 Assemble and bake pizzas to enjoy after a long day of adventure.

A simple, realistic, and delicious mod 🍴, perfect for players who love adding a touch of everyday life to their Minecraft experience!
